'''√j-ng-v''' ('''kajangav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quack|quack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quack|quack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajangav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijangav || jijangav || shijangav || kijangav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujangav || jujujangav || shushujangav || kukujangav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujangav || jujangav || shujangav || kujangav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujangav || jujangav || shujangav || kujangav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejangav || jejangav || shejangav || kejangav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojangav || jojojangav || shoshojangav || kokojangav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojangav || jojangav || shojangav || kojangav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojangav || jojangav || shojangav || kojangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jangav || jangav || jangav || jangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jangav || jangav || jangav || jangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jangav || jangav || jangav || jangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jangav || jangav || jangav || jangav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjangav || jæjangav || shæjangav || kæjangav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajangav || jajajangav || shashajangav || kakajangav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajangav || jajangav || shajangav || kajangav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajangav || jajangav || shajangav || kajangav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajangav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajangav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajangav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajangavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajangavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajangavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajangavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajangavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajangavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajangavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajangavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajangavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajangavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajangavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajangavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajangavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajangavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajangavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajangavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajangavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajangavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajangavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajangavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajangavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajangavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajangavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajangavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajangavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajangavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajangavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajangavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajangavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajangavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajangavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajangavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajangavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajangavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajangavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajangavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajangavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajangavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajangavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajangavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajangavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajangavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajangavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajangavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajangavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajangavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajangavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajangavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajangavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajangavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajangavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajangavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajangavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajangavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajangavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajangavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajangavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajangavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajangavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajangavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
